articles.title: Bhutan’s Central Bank Adopts Ripple’s XRP Ledger To Launch A Digital Version Of Its National Currency
articles.description: Key takeaways Ripple announces a partnership with the central bank of Bhutan – the Royal Monetary Authority (RMA). The RMA plans to issue a CBDC using Ripple’s open-source XRP Ledger (XRPL). The announcement is a step forward for Ripple that has been fighting a legal battle with the SEC.
